title: Advanced Diamonds
description: A vanilla friendly, open-source mod that adds in more tiers of Diamonds
body:
# **ADVANCED DIAMONDS**
This is the Advanced Diamonds Mod. First of all this mod IS AND ONLY WILL BE ON NEOFORGE. I don't have plans for a fabric version. Also this mod will stay and be updated on 1.21.1 as it is the most stable version for NeoForge Mods

![Advanced Diamond Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c30f5f3d111ed23ce587ead660a8cc931403121.png)

## Mod

This mod adds in 3 advanced forms of Diamond. First being Ironified Diamond, Second being Goldified Diamond, Third being Supermond. You can obtain them if you grind the respective block for the essences. Like Gold Block -> Gold Essence. then in a crafting table combine the essence and the diamond to get the corresponding Diamond. Also you'll need the Advanced Diamond Upgrade Smithing Template. It works like the netherite upgrade template. It's dupelication unique block is Dragons Breath. Special Ender Diamonds for saving and teleporting as well as Diamond Lava. For the high cost you get VERY HIGH rewards. You will discover it if you play the game with this mod.

**Quick Note:** I will add more contents for Diamonds in the future.

## Gameplay
For recipes please use JEI mod as there is a lot of recipes.

This Mod Pacifies Enderman and Piglins with Goldified Diamond and Supermond. Pacifies Iron Golem and Phantoms with Ironfied Diamond and Supermond. these can be turned off in the config.

Essence Grinder Recipes:
1. Iron Block -> Iron Essence
2. Gold Block -> Gold Essence
3. Netherite Block -> Netherite Essence

Also you can get the Essence Grinder by trading with a Stone Mason Villager.

**IMPORTANT NOTE:** The Alpha key is defaulted to the 'Z' key

## Mod Loader
